about.gymDescription: Located in the heart of Jerusalem, Team Gershon is a premier martial arts academy dedicated to the art and discipline of Muay Thai and Boxing. Under the direct guidance of Head Coach Itay Gershon, the gym provides a world-class training environment designed to build physical strength, mental resilience, and technical precision. Whether you are a total beginner looking to get in shape and learn self-defense, or an advanced athlete aiming for professional competition, our community welcomes all levels.
about.itayBio: Founded by Itay Gershon, a distinguished professional athlete with an illustrative career in Muay Thai and Kickboxing. Itay is a former World Amateur Champion and has represented Israel at the highest levels of combat sports, including competing extensively in the prestigious Glory Kickboxing league, where he was ranked #4 in the world lightweight division. With over 100 professional fights and dozens of victories, including World and European titles, he brings unparalleled elite expertise to every training session at Team Gershon. Alongside his elite professional standards and iron discipline, what truly sets Itay apart is his warm, engaging, and approachable coaching style. He ensures every session is conducted with a smile, fostering a positive, welcoming, and family-like atmosphere that makes everyone feel at home from day one.

essential.title: ESSENTIAL
essential.desc: The perfect entry point for those looking to start their journey and learn the basics.

foundations.title: FOUNDATIONS
foundations.desc: Build a rock-solid base with consistent training and fundamental technique drills.

performance.title: PERFORMANCE
performance.desc: Take your training to the next level with increased intensity and tactical workshops.

proAthlete.title: PRO-ATHLETE
proAthlete.desc: Designed for dedicated practitioners aiming for elite physical and technical conditioning.

fightCamp.title: FIGHT CAMP
fightCamp.desc: The ultimate immersion. Full competition preparation and peak performance training.

youngLions.title: YOUNG LIONS
youngLions.desc: Safe and professional classes focusing on discipline, confidence, and martial arts basics.

items.name: Maor Morad
items.text: I’ve been training with Itay for a year and a half, and I don't think there could be a place where I'd have as much fun as at Team Gershon. For me personally, the training here has boosted my self-confidence and my mental and physical strength, and I'm only 14. The place has felt like home to me for a while now, and I'm sure it will for anyone who joins. I am proud to be part of this killer gym, it's a huge privilege.

items.name: Idan Haim Jani
items.text: I’ve been training for a good few years and have been to many clubs, and one of the clubs that drew me in the most is Gershon's. It feels like a highly professional home with a warm attitude towards everyone, no games. Itay gives his soul to the club, invests endlessly, and is always looking to improve it. There is no place that compares to it.

items.name: Shlomo Emanuel
items.text: I’ve trained at many gyms, and Team Gershon has been the highest level and most fun environment to train at. Not only is Itai a world class fighter, he is also able to give over his skills to his students and is someone to look up to in life. Whether you train as a hobby or compete as a fighter this is the place to be. It’s a privilege to be a part of this team!

items.name: Yochai Eliyahu
items.text: I've been training for almost 5 years, and as soon as I heard that Itay Gershon himself opened a group, I signed up immediately. I simply have no words. The attitude, the investment, the education - just everything. Beyond the path he has paved for many fighters to grow, the caring, the atmosphere - everything is just perfect. It's simply a privilege to come and train here.

items.name: Benny Movshovitz
items.text: I've been training here for a while, and it's the most professional home I could ask for. Itay Gershon isn't just an elite fighter; he's a coach who sees everyone and demands honesty and hard work from you. There's no posing and no games here, just sweat, precise technique, and a level that's hard to find elsewhere. For anyone looking for a place that will truly push them forward, Team Gershon is the place.

items.name: Meir Israel
items.text: Guys, this is the best gym in Jerusalem and in the country in general, truly an international level. I've trained at many gyms in my life, but Team Gershon is on a completely different level. It's a really great club. Anyone who wants to learn boxing and Muay Thai from scratch and become a fighter, this is the place for them. Patient coaches go over the smallest details with you. I've been training here for almost two years, and I'm really happy, feeling good, and progressing day by day. Highly recommended.

items.name: Ron Ben Kiki
items.text: Before I came to Team Gershon, I was at a few gyms, but none of them were like Itay's. Itay is a professional; he himself is very experienced and is the person with the most knowledge in the sport in Israel. What I love is that everyone gets personal attention at the gym, regardless of whether you're a beginner or have been competing for years. And the workouts are insane—the most professional training you could ask for. I can testify about guys I know at the gym who improved more in one year than any athlete would in several years at another gym. In short, I highly recommend Team Gershon to anyone who wants to improve themselves, their fitness, and their health. This is the place.

items.name: Itzik Buksapan
items.text: I’ve been training with Itay for over a year. The number one gym in the country, from the way people are treated to the overall atmosphere. If you want to become a professional, this is the place!!!!!

items.name: Eliel Chen
items.text: First of all, the personal attention is like a father to a child. Patient, doesn't get angry, funny, and delivers classes at the highest level. I came from another club, and the gap between Team Gershon and other places is like night and day. The coach gives his heart and soul, and we see results in the ring. He personally believes in me, and I'm sure I'll go very far.

gallery.body: Itay Gershon in professional competition. Every round, every strike — the same standard we train at Team Gershon.

contact.body: Your first session is free. Come see the gym, meet the team, and find out what Team Gershon is all about.

methods.addressValue: רחוב רבי צדוק 12 (ביה״ס גבעת גונן), ירושלים
